title: Crispy Moroccan Chickpea Flatbread
description: Savory, crunchy flatbreads made from chickpea and allpurpose flour, spiced with Chinese fivespice powder and topped with roasted chickpeas for a proteinrich, energizing snack.
instructions: Preheat oven to 220 °C (425 °F). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Whisk chickpea flour, all‑purpose flour, baking powder, salt, Chinese five‑spice powder, cumin, coriander, and cayenne in a large bowl.
Create a well in the center, pour in olive oil and warm water, and stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 4–5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place dough in an oiled bowl, cover, and let rest for 15 minutes.
Divide dough into 4 equal portions and roll each into a 30 cm (12‑inch) circle.
Sprinkle each flatbread with a tablespoon of roasted chickpeas, pressing gently to adhere.
Transfer flatbreads to the preheated sheet and bake for 10–12 minutes until edges are golden and the surface is crisp.
Brush tops with a little extra olive oil immediately after removing from the oven for extra crunch.
Let cool for 5 minutes, then garnish with chopped parsley and serve warm.
